passes_applied: OPT-3 max_autotune (applied via config_patches={'max_autotune': True} to compile_fx)
passes_degraded: OPT-2 _pass_pretranspose: NOT_APPLIED (graceful) — aten.t(get_attr) pattern not found; pass targets post-Inductor-lowered graph but runs pre-Inductor in dedup path
